task: Produce an auditable, specialist-reviewable analysis reconciling flow cytometry gate drift using only the supplied embedded packet. Separate confirmed failures from warnings using the supplied scoring rule; compute economic/safety margin; state evidence controlling the final decision. Deliverables: flow_gate_drift_report.xlsx and gating_change_log.md containing executable formulas or logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs or use external data; mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. Scoring rule: score = first metric + 0.6*second metric - 0.25*third metric after unit normalization; score > normalized_threshold_score => fail; score within 10% below threshold => warn. Remediation options may be combined only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd. Expert-review flag required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift. All calculations must use only the embedded packet.
